meta.title: Logitaka — AI System for Task and Context Management
meta.description: Just say what's happening. Logitaka will figure it out, organize, remind, and tell you what to do next.

imagePlaceholders.hero: Optional: hero image about a person, system, and controlled chaos. Currently, the block acts as abstract visualization.

hero.headline: Logitaka. The system that manages your tasks.
hero.subheadline: Tell what's happening — by voice or text. Logitaka will build the structure, set priorities, remind you, and tell you what to do next.

stats.label: of project management and quality control

supporting: A sharp, living, minimalist shell without unnecessary visual noise.
One system for daily flow, projects, decisions, and next steps.
Two themes, three languages, desktop and mobile as equal modes.

visualCards.title: Raw Input
visualCards.body: Voice, text, notes, chat fragments, incomplete thoughts.

visualCards.title: Structured System
visualCards.body: Projects, tasks, decisions, plan, calendar, current real context.

visualCards.title: Movement
visualCards.body: The system doesn't just store. It leads further and keeps order alive.

problem.title: Recognize yourself in at least one.

items.title: Too many tasks — only one head
items.body: Work, personal, plans, promises. Everything is important, everything is urgent. It just doesn't fit.

items.title: You forget not because you are irresponsible
items.body: There was just no one to remind you at the right moment. And no one to keep track.

items.title: You know what to do — but don't know where to start
items.body: Plenty of tasks. But when you sit down — it's unclear what to grab right now.

items.title: You plan — but plans don't live
items.body: You wrote a list, made a plan. Three days later it no longer reflects reality.

items.title: You feel you are stalling — but don't understand where
items.body: Something goes wrong, but it's hard to articulate. And there's no one to ask.

problem.closing: This isn't a willpower problem. This is a problem of lacking a system that actually holds everything together.

transformation.title: How it works.
body: On first entry, Logitaka asks questions and listens. Based on what you tell — it automatically forms a structure: projects, tasks, decisions, plan, calendar.
The more you tell — the more accurately the system understands your situation.

At the core is not just AI. The methodology is built on algorithms for project management and quality control. The system works on proven principles — it doesn't adapt to chaos, but helps to get out of it.
transformation.coreBody: Under the hood is not just AI, but digitized management algorithms. The system doesn't adapt to chaos, but formats it into a rigid structure. Works for you 24/7.
list: The more you tell — the clearer the system understands your reality.
Important fragments stop living separately and fold into a solid picture.
Decisions, plans, and next steps stop getting lost in the chaos of conversation.
The structure doesn't freeze. It continues to live and update with you.

capabilities.title: What the system does.

items.title: Builds structure from what you say
items.body: Projects, tasks, deadlines, decisions — are formed automatically based on your words. Nothing needs to be typed manually.

items.title: Conducts daily sessions
items.body: Tell how the day went. The system will go through active projects, clarify statuses, shift deadlines, add reminders.

items.title: Manages the calendar
items.body: Connects to your calendar. Reminders and tasks are added automatically — to you and your employees.

items.title: Holds decisions and agreements
items.body: Everything discussed and decided is fixed separately. Doesn't get lost in messages.

items.title: Works by methodology, not by your mood
items.body: The system has a clear structure. It guides — you follow. This is exactly what brings results.

capabilities.closing: You don't lead the system. You live. The system leads everything else.

context.label: Live Context
context.title: Context that doesn't disappear.
body: A regular AI chat doesn't remember you between sessions. Logitaka works differently.

Every conversation is summarized and entered into the project context. Decisions are fixed separately. Plans are extracted automatically. You can return in a week — the system knows where you stopped.
Works with leading models — OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, and others. You can switch between models — the context is shared and up-to-date.
context.closing: You think out loud. Logitaka turns it into a structure.

modelTeaser.title: 10+ Top AI Models. Pay Only for Real Complexity.
modelTeaser.subtitle: Why use a sledgehammer to crack a nut? Logitaka lets you use fast, cost-effective models for daily routines, saving heavyweights for truly complex challenges.
bullets: Smart defaults: cost-effective AI for 90% of tasks
Seamless switching: change models in one click
Transparent spending: always know what you pay for
modelTeaser.cta: Find the perfect AI setup for my role

audience.title: For anyone who has a lot of tasks.

items.title: Freelancer / designer / blogger
items.body: Clients, deadlines, ideas, messages — the system keeps everything in one place.

items.title: Manager / entrepreneur
items.body: Team, projects, decisions, control — without having to keep everything in your head.

items.title: Developer
items.body: Project context, decision history, tasks — plus direct integration with code editor.

items.title: Anyone with a large volume of tasks
items.body: It doesn't matter what you do. Zero entry barrier — just speak.

audience.closing: The entry barrier is zero. Anyone can handle it — just speak.

devTeam.label: Dev Team
devTeam.title: Operational layer around development.
body: Code is not the only place where context gets lost. Decisions disappear in chats. A week later, the team cannot restore why they did it exactly this way.
Logitaka fixes the history of decisions, the current state of the project, and next steps — in one place, always up-to-date.

For those working with AI assistants in code: discuss the task in Logitaka — with one action send ready instructions to the editor. Code is executed under your control, with verified instructions, without extra iterations.
points: Fewer switches between chat, code, and project memory.
Reasons for decisions don't disappear a day after discussion.
Next steps stay next to the real technical context.
AI coding remains under control, rather than turning into chaotic copying.

valueStack.label: Comparison
valueStack.title: What it would cost separately.
valueStack.subtitle: Accessing the same models directly would cost you several times more. Logitaka gives you everything — in one interface, for one subscription.
valueStack.disclaimer: * Rate: 1 USD ≈ 2 ₼ including 18% VAT on electronic services. Prices current at time of publication.

pricing.title: Pricing.

enterprise.title: Custom Solutions for Enterprise
enterprise.description: We offer flexible customization and complete deployment in a secure isolated Cloud (Private Cloud) or on your company's own local servers (On-Premise). You will receive dedicated language models, integration with internal databases, SLA guarantees, and absolute control over your confidentiality.

pricing.waitlist: Beta testing is currently underway. Leave a request — you will be among the first to get access.
pricing.betaNote: Beta testing is currently underway. Leave a request — we'll give access as one of the first.

items.question: What is Logitaka?
items.answer: An AI-based task management system. You tell what's happening — it builds the structure, manages projects, reminds, and guides.

items.question: Is it just an AI chat?
items.answer: No. A regular chat answers questions and forgets you. Logitaka maintains constant context and works as an operating system around your tasks.

items.question: Do I need to understand technology?
items.answer: No. Just speak or write — the system does the rest.

items.question: Who is it for?
items.answer: For anyone with many tasks and no system to keep them in order.

items.question: Do I need to be already organized?
items.answer: No. The system accepts chaos and structures it itself.

items.question: Does it work for teams?
items.answer: Yes. You can manage tasks and reminders for employees through the system.

items.question: What about data privacy?
items.answer: For companies with high requirements — Custom plan with local deployment without external agents.

finalCta.label: Final CTA
finalCta.title: Logitaka. The system that manages your tasks.
finalCta.body: Beta testing is open. Leave a request — you'll get access and see how it works on your real tasks.
finalCta.notice: By joining the waitlist, you agree to the Terms of Use and acknowledge the Privacy Policy.

footer.tagline: The system keeps order — you just live.

s0.text: We have a Q2 team meeting tomorrow. Need to prepare an agenda and remind everyone by evening.
Task created: Prepare agenda — by tomorrow
I've scheduled the meeting and added the tasks. Should I send a reminder to the team today at 18:00, or choose another time?

s1.text: Client Art-Studio was supposed to send logo edits yesterday. Silence so far.
Logged: Waiting for edits from Art-Studio
Open issue: No response from client
Understood, project status updated. Should I remind you to write them if they don't reply by evening?

s2.text: We're migrating to a new server on Friday. Can't forget about environment variables and SSL.
Added deployment tasks. Would you like me to create a migration checklist so we don't miss anything on Friday?

questions: Did the client approve the new deadline?
Do we need a mobile version for this release?

decisions.text: Designer is delayed by a week — new deadline May 7.
Site structure: 5 pages, no blog in the first release.
Continuing with current designer, not looking for a new one.

history.title: Session 3.
history.text: Updated designer status. Added task to notify client. Logged 1 decision.

history.title: Session 2.
history.text: Timeline shifted. Discussed options — decided to keep current contractor. Logged 2 decisions.

history.title: Session 1.
history.text: Project launched. Approved 5-page structure, handed over brief.

hero.title:
Not all models are
equally necessary.
hero.description1: An expensive model doesn't mean it's the best for your tasks. It means it is optimized for specialized challenges that fall outside your daily workflow.
hero.description2: Logitaka is architected so that even budget-friendly models confidently handle complex tasks—because the system provides them with the precise context and clear instructions. Below are all the models operating within the system.

intro.title: 10 Models. Each in its place.
intro.description: You might not have encountered most of them. That does not mean they are inferior to the ones you know.

price.title: The price gap is massive.
price.description: No raw numbers—only the ratio. This illustrates the impact on your balance every time a model is selected without strategic intent.

matrix.title: Capabilities do not reflect price.
matrix.description: An evaluation of how each model performs on tasks that actually arise within Logitaka. These are not abstract benchmarks, but specific functional scenarios.

scenarios.title: Identifying the right model for you.
scenarios.description: Disregard marketing hype—choose based on functional requirements.

advisor.title: Model Selection Advisor
advisor.subtitle: Select your typical workflow, and we will demonstrate which models will cover 100% of your requirements without cost overruns.
advisor.footerNote: All models are available immediately. Switch at any moment.

footer.copyright: © 2025 Logitaka. The system that manages your affairs.

models.name: Qwen 3.6 Plus
models.about: Qwen is the flagship series from Alibaba, a global technology titan. While less recognized outside of China, independent benchmarks consistently place it alongside models that command significantly higher premiums.
models.logitaka: An exceptional default for most users. It manages personal and professional projects without unnecessary expenditure. Offers one of the most compelling price-to-performance ratios in the catalog.
models.excessive: The real question is: why not use this one?

models.name: GLM-5.1
models.about: GLM is developed by Zhipu AI, a laboratory emerging from Tsinghua University—one of China's top three academic institutions. It has long been a leading linguistic model and remains a dominant force in its price class.
models.logitaka: A dependable engine for daily operations. It excels at project management, decision logging, and executive summarization.
models.excessive: Rarely. For the majority of Logitaka tasks, it represents an optimal technical choice.

models.name: Mistral Large 3
models.about: Mistral AI is a premier European AI laboratory founded by Google DeepMind and Meta alumni. Their flagship model is engineered for precision, multilingual fluency, and enterprise-grade applications.
models.logitaka: A robust selection for projects involving deep analysis, formal correspondence, or multi-language documentation. Operates with high predictability.
models.excessive: For elementary tasks like 'remind me' or 'update status'—its processing power is overkill.

models.name: Kimi K2.6
models.about: Kimi is the standout product of Moonshot AI, a high-growth startup. It is renowned for its industry-leading long context window, capable of ingesting volumes of text that other models simply cannot process.
models.logitaka: Optimized for projects with extensive historical context—essential when decision trails are long and you need immediate orientation.
models.excessive: For brief interactions or isolated queries, its primary architectural advantage remains untapped.

models.name: DeepSeek v4 Pro
models.about: DeepSeek is the Chinese laboratory that disrupted the AI market in 2024–2025 by delivering performance parity with Western leaders at a fraction of the cost. A definitive challenge to the 'premium price equals premium quality' narrative.
models.logitaka: The preferred choice when clarity and rigid structure are paramount. Highly effective where precision of language is non-negotiable.
models.excessive: For domestic checklists and rapid updates—equivalent to hiring an architect to reorganize your chairs.

models.name: Grok 4.3
models.about: Grok was developed by xAI, Elon Musk's venture. It is recognized for its direct, unfiltered communication style. Grok 4.3 is a sophisticated iteration with significantly enhanced reasoning capabilities.
models.logitaka: A versatile high-performer. Maintains stability across the spectrum of project management requirements.
models.excessive: Less frequently than top-tier models—the pricing is justifiable for the broad utility it provides.

models.name: Gemini 3.1 Pro
models.about: Gemini is the pinnacle series from Google DeepMind. The Pro version strikes an equilibrium between high-level reasoning and accessibility, with a specific focus on cross-referencing massive datasets.
models.logitaka: The strategic choice for document-heavy projects where extracting the essence or synthesizing structured summaries is the primary goal.
models.excessive: For routine short-form tasks, the cost-to-utility ratio is not optimized.

models.name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
models.about: Anthropic was established by former OpenAI leadership with a mandate for safety and reasoning integrity. Claude Sonnet is the workforce of the lineup: consistently superior across diverse tasks at a competitive price point.
models.logitaka: A premier selection for advanced system tasks. It demonstrates an nuanced understanding of complex Logitaka directives. Ideal when tone and text quality are critical.
models.excessive: For simple status updates, more economical alternatives exist. However, when reliability is required, Sonnet is unfailing.

models.name: Claude Opus 4.7
models.about: Opus is Anthropic’s most powerful model, consistently ranking in the global top 3 for analytical complexity. Engineered for environments where the cost of error is prohibitive and depth of analysis is mandatory.
models.logitaka: Justified exclusively for high-stakes maneuvers: strategic overhauls or convoluted scenarios without obvious solutions. Such tasks typically occur only a few times annually.
models.excessive: For daily project tracking—equivalent to requesting a surgeon to apply a bandage. 10–15 times more expensive for an identical result.

models.name: GPT-5.5
models.about: OpenAI catalyzed the mass AI era in 2022. GPT-5.5 represents one of the most potent computational tools available, excelling specifically in multi-step agentic tasks and technical orchestration.
models.logitaka: Excessive for 95% of daily tasks. Its utility is realized when processing raw, unstructured data arrays (e.g., massive logs or technical transcriptions) that require flawless parsing.
models.excessive: For the majority of standard Logitaka workflows. Unless you are orchestrating complex logic or parsing massive datasets, this is an unnecessary expense.

scenarioItems.title: Personal Projects and Life
scenarioItems.desc: Home renovations, financial planning, travel, health, and education. These are all high-value projects.

scenarioItems.title: Freelance and Private Practice
scenarioItems.desc: Client management, deadlines, formal correspondence, and agreements. Structured tasks with moderate context.

scenarioItems.title: Small Business and Teams
scenarioItems.desc: Collaborative projects, oversight, task delegation, and the formalization of team decisions.

scenarioItems.title: Research and Analytics
scenarioItems.desc: Deep analysis, comparative studies, managing massive datasets, and information synthesis.

scenarioItems.title: Technical Projects
scenarioItems.desc: Architectural planning, technical decision trails, and maintaining team alignment on specifications.

scenarioItems.title: Strategic Decisions
scenarioItems.desc: High-stakes tasks occurring quarterly—where the margin for error is zero.

roles.rationale: An executive requires absolute precision in strategy and velocity in routine operations. We eliminate expensive models for routine while reserving the most powerful for critical decision-making.

discussion.desc: High-level strategic discourse with nuanced business context.

roles.rationale: For product leadership, structural integrity, task management, and communication empathy (Gemini) are paramount.

meeting.desc: Optimized for quick stand-ups and task tracking.

discussion.desc: Data synthesis and unconventional problem solving.

devchat.desc: Precision delivery of requirements to engineering teams.

roles.rationale: Human-centric work necessitates high empathy (Gemini), while processing hundreds of candidates requires a long context window (Kimi).

discussion.desc: Analysis of massive resume databases and compliance documents.

roles.rationale: Architects require high-tier models for database design, while routine can be delegated to base models. DevChat mandates technical precision.

meeting.desc: Rapid assessment of commits and bug reports.

discussion.desc: Collaborative architectural brainstorming sessions.

devchat.desc: Log parsing and Git diff analysis.

roles.rationale: Primary coding occurs in the IDE; Logitaka focuses on structural models and task logging.

discussion.desc: API logic and structural validation.

roles.rationale: Systematic pedantry, test case management, and long-form log analysis (Kimi) are critical for quality assurance.

discussion.desc: Ingesting and parsing massive log files.

roles.rationale: Qwen provides high interface awareness for routine work, while Gemini serves as an empathetic creative partner.

discussion.desc: Ideation, moodboard synthesis, and brainstorming.

roles.rationale: Schedule orchestration, reference sourcing, and management of lengthy rights-transfer agreements.

discussion.desc: Analyzing complex client contracts.

roles.rationale: Gemini 3.1 Pro generates vibrant, human-centric prose and manages documentation with superior context.

discussion.desc: Drafting vivid long-form copy and interviews.

roles.rationale: Demands high-level data analytics (structure) combined with audience sentiment awareness.

discussion.desc: Development of brand positioning and strategy.

roles.rationale: Reviewing extensive PDF libraries and drafting essays. The primary requirement is long-form document processing.

discussion.desc: Rapid citation retrieval from academic sources.

roles.rationale: Focused on algorithmic optimization, mathematics, and code structural integrity.

discussion.desc: Deconstruction of complex mathematical formulas.

devchat.desc: Support for engineering and study projects.

roles.rationale: Analyzing thousands of pages of research, grant writing, and peer review.

discussion.desc: Synthesizing data across dozens of PDF sources.

roles.rationale: In the legal field, errors are fatal. For complex challenges, GPT-5.5 is utilized for absolute technical precision.

discussion.desc: Reviewing contracts for potential vulnerabilities.

roles.rationale: Rigid structural requirements, mathematical rigor, and absolute precision for complex fiscal tasks.

discussion.desc: Detailed analysis of financial tables and budgets.

roles.rationale: Complex calculations, industry standards and regulatory codes, and multi-level project planning.

discussion.desc: Cross-referencing technical documentation and regulatory norms.

roles.rationale: Supply chain orchestration, deadline oversight, and large-scale spreadsheet management.

discussion.desc: Route optimization and price list analysis.

roles.rationale: Patient interactions are managed by the empathetic Sonnet, while treatment protocols necessitate the uncompromising precision of GPT-5.5.

meeting.desc: Monitoring patient records with high emotional intelligence.

discussion.desc: Consulting extensive medical directories and research.

roles.rationale: Exclusive focus on high empathy and the detection of subtle nuances in human communication (Sonnet/Opus).

discussion.desc: Analyzing session transcriptions with maximum EQ.

roles.rationale: Coordinating volunteers, managing grants, and overseeing charters. A balance of administrative structure and empathy.

discussion.desc: Drafting extensive, multi-page grant applications.

roles.rationale: Independent management. Focused on reducing cognitive load, lifestyle planning, and cost efficiency.

meeting.desc: Daily self-sync: prioritizing the day's objectives.

discussion.desc: Brainstorming and ideation with an empathetic agent.

roles.rationale: Optimized for value. Premium models are strictly excessive; base models efficiently handle all home-centric tasks.

discussion.desc: Planning travel itineraries or home improvement stages.

hero.title: Everything hidden under the hood.
